summary: Comprehensive testing of fintech dashboard application completed successfully. All core functionality working including authentication, dashboard stats, transactions CRUD, budgets CRUD, stock data, alerts, and export features.

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings in console about width/height -1
Missing accessibility descriptions for dialog content

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Google Sign in button
Backend API health check returns running status
Stock data endpoint returns NSE/BSE stock data with fallback
Authentication flow works with test session tokens
Dashboard stats endpoint returns correct financial data
Transactions CRUD operations working (GET, POST, DELETE)
Budgets CRUD operations working (GET, POST, DELETE)
Export endpoints return CSV data for transactions and reports
Protected routes require authentication (401 without token)
Dashboard navigation between all tabs working
Transaction creation, search, and filtering functional
User profile dropdown and logout working
